return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"app",style:{textAlign:'center',padding:'20px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"CloudScope"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>setSelectedSender(''),style:{marginBottom:'20px'},children:"\u2190 Back to Senders"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h2",{children:[selectedSender," \u2014 ",selectedYear]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(WordCloud,{words:words})]});}export default function App(){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(GoogleOAuthProvider,{clientId:"613649107764-a62ejns04vkh5lc9sdc412idbpkfrn88.apps.googleusercontent.com",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AppInner,{})});}
